name: ingestion_id
description: Unique UUID for this specific run (Cloud Function Execution ID)

name: row_count
description: Number of rows loaded into BigQuery

name: error_message
description: Full error trace if status is FAILED

name: target_table
description: Where the data tried to go

name: total_records
description: Number of rows present in CSV

name: processed_records
description: Number of rows processed into BigQuery

name: good_records
description: Number of good records loaded into BigQuery

name: bad_records
description: Number of bad records loaded into BigQuery
